description_long: This lamppost features an ornate, sculptural design with intricate decorative elements running along its entire height. The post is composed of a series of carved motifs, including floral and possibly mythical or animal forms, giving it a highly artistic and classical appearance. The top section is crowned with a large, elaborate finial that appears to be the lamp head, though it is integrated into the decorative structure rather than standing out as a distinct fixture. The base is square and solid, providing stability and a sense of permanence. The surface texture is rough and weathered, suggesting it is made from stone or cast concrete, typical of historical or heritage urban environments. There are no visible modern attachments, signage, or separate lamp heads, emphasizing its role as a decorative and functional urban amenity.
description: An ornate, sculpted lamppost with intricate carvings and a large decorative finial, made from rough stone or concrete, standing on a square base.
description_view_0: A side view showing the layered, sculptural carvings and the narrow profile of the post.
description_view_1: A frontal view highlighting the symmetrical decorative motifs and the prominent finial at the top.
description_view_2: The opposite side view, similar to view 0, with visible relief carvings and the post's vertical structure.
description_view_3: A rear view displaying the back of the decorative elements and the solid base.
attribute_lamp_head_design: Large, integrated sculptural finial with classical and floral motifs
